commands.review_summary:
The PR adds two Groq-hosted models to the agents small live model priority list, updates selector tests, and updates live testing docs.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +8, Docs 0. Total +10 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR broadens a live-test selection matrix and docs rather than fixing a reported bug. The behavior is source-verifiable through the small live selection path and the updated selector tests.

target.title: test(agents): broaden small live hosted model matrix
target.body:
## Summary
- Add hosted small-model coverage for `groq/llama-3.1-8b-instant` and `groq/openai/gpt-oss-20b` to the small live model priority matrix.
- Keep the Ollama entry in the same small-model family coverage so local/API-like small model behavior stays visible.
- Update the live testing help page to mention hosted small model families.

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts docs/help/testing-live.md`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/help/testing-live.md`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-compat.test.ts` - 2 files / 114 tests passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- AWS Crabbox `check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_2972809e42aa`, slug `jade-crayfish`, run `run_85010e8d91e5`, exit `0`, cleanup `leaseStopped=true`.

## Rebase note
The previous `check-test-types` failure was stale-base drift in `extensions/browser/src/browser/client-fetch.loopback-auth.test.ts`, not this PR's changed surface. Rebased onto `origin/main` `7a750100c97ab548c9a7a5da05daffe9a4ce8079`, which includes `611adb2ee0 test(browser): align loopback auth mock types`; the new AWS Crabbox changed gate passed the core test type lane.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: the small live model priority matrix now includes hosted small-model families in addition to Ollama, so the live compatibility lane can exercise API-style small-model behavior.
Real environment tested: local Codex worktree with shared `node_modules` symlink plus AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
Evidence after fix: `run_85010e8d91e5` completed with exit `0` on provider `aws`, lease `cbx_2972809e42aa`, slug `jade-crayfish`; local focused Vitest reported 2 files / 114 tests passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs` changed lanes passed, including typecheck, test typecheck, lint, docs formatting, guards, and import-cycle checks.
What was not tested: no live paid provider calls were executed by this PR; it expands the live-test selection matrix and validates the changed code/docs paths.
target.author: vincentkoc
